name: Jar Battlers
short_description: Jar Battlers located in a toriyama-ish retro style pixelated world, where you have to get rid of your opponents using jars, bombs and more, in the numerous arenas of this crazy tournament!!
detailed_description:
Are you into smash local multiplayers ?

Jar Battlers is a game located in a Toriyama-ish retro style pixelated world, where you have to get rid of your opponents using jars, bombs and more, in the numerous arenas of this crazy tournament!!

Play from 2 to 4 players with 16 amazing characters to fight each other within 40 fresh looking arenas..
This game is meant to be a funny way to spend time with your homies whenever you want, for a cheap price, as his developer definitely put his soul in it!
